creator: thomas@FreeBSD.org
text:
OK, same symptoms but with another model. Here again the unit rejects an
INQUIRY command with the EVPD bit set, which could be avoided with a
CAM_QUIRK_NOSERIAL entry. But then again, the only consequence of not
having this quirk entry is the additional message from the ata layer
on the console, which is really inocuous.

If we really wanted to hack around that, we could use the ATA_R_QUIET
flag on ATA commands passed from ATAPI/CAM to ATA, on the assumption
that the CAM subsystem will take care of the reporting, but I'm
reluctant to doing that as this may also lose some other valuable error
indications. (Or we could set that flag just for INQUIRY with EVPD set,
since we know that several ATAPI units fail that request, and we can
safely ignore that failure).

Thomas.
